# AboutIAM

> AboutIAM is an open-source, 100% client-side, browser-native academy and simulation workbench for Identity and Access Management (IAM). It teaches OAuth 2.0/OIDC, SAML, JWT, FIDO2/WebAuthn, ABAC/RBAC, LDAP, Zero Trust, ZKPs, and SPIFFE/SPIRE through hands-on, interactive playgrounds rather than static documentation, with progressive detail for both beginners and expert architects. Every cryptographic operation and policy evaluation runs natively in the browser — there is no backend, no telemetry, and no server-side data collection.

Runs entirely client-side (React 19, TypeScript, Vite, Zustand). Source: https://github.com/mayankrajjaiswal/aboutiam (MIT licensed). Live site: https://www.aboutiam.com/.

## Core Platform

- [Overview Dashboard](https://www.aboutiam.com/): Progress tracker, track graduations, and identity-history trivia.
- [Beginner's Primer](https://www.aboutiam.com/primer/): Plain-English onboarding — Identify, Authenticate, Authorize, Audit.
- [Zero-to-Hero Pathway](https://www.aboutiam.com/roadmap/): Chronological, guided learning sequence across all tracks.
- [IAM Academy](https://www.aboutiam.com/learn/): 6 course tracks, 36 modules, with persisted completion progress.
- [Playground Catalog](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/): Index of every interactive simulator.

## Playgrounds (interactive simulators)

- [JWT Studio](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/jwt/): Browser-native HS256 signing, `none`-algorithm and JWKS-spoofing exploits.
- [OAuth 2.0 / OIDC Visualizer](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/oauth/): Step-by-step front/back-channel flow animation with PKCE and raw HTTP inspection.
- [SAML 2.0 Workbench](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/saml/): XML assertion builder and Signature Wrapping (SSW) attack simulator.
- [FIDO2 / WebAuthn Lab](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/fido2/): Emulated key ceremonies parsing `clientDataJSON` and `authenticatorData`.
- [Access Control Lab](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/access/): Dynamic ABAC vs. static RBAC policy evaluation engine.
- [LDAP Tree Simulator](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/ldap/): Active Directory schema tree with live LDAP filter search.
- [Zero Trust Planner](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/zta/): NIST SP 800-207 trust-algorithm risk scoring.
- [AI Threat Lab](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/ai-threat-lab/): Voice-deepfake attacks against legacy MFA vs. FIDO2 hardware bounds.
- [ZKP Wallet](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/zkp-wallet/): Zero-knowledge age proofs without exposing raw birthdates.
- [Ambient Trust](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/ambient-trust/): Continuous ambient biometric telemetry and session trust decay.
- [Workload Mesh](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/workload-mesh/): SPIFFE/SPIRE attestation and X.509 SVID issuance.
- [Auth Matchmaker](https://www.aboutiam.com/explore/matchmaker/): Wizard that recommends an auth stack with copyable boilerplate.
- [XACML 3.0 Policy Engine](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/xacml/): Real combining-algorithm engine — deny-overrides, permit-overrides, first-applicable, only-one-applicable.
- [GNAP Grant Negotiation Visualizer](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/gnap/): RFC 9635 grant request, interaction, continuation, and key-bound token issuance timeline.
- [CAEP Continuous Access Evaluation Lab](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/caep/): Shared Signals Framework transmitter pushing signed SETs to receivers in real time.
- [Verifiable Credentials & DID Lab](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/vc-did/): Issuer/Holder/Verifier flow signing and verifying a real Ed25519 VC and Presentation.

## Security Tools (free, client-side utilities)

- [Tools Catalog](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/): Index of every client-side IAM/security utility, categorized.
- [JWT Decoder](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/jwt-decoder/): Decode a token's header, payload, and signature; flag insecure algorithms.
- [JWT Generator](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/jwt-generator/): Build and sign tokens with HS256/HS384/HS512/RS256.
- [Base64 / Base64URL Encoder-Decoder](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/base64-encoder-decoder/): Encode/decode text and files, standard or URL-safe.
- [SHA-256 & Hash Generator](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/sha256-hash-generator/): SHA-1/256/384/512 checksums for text or files.
- [HMAC Generator & Verifier](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/hmac-generator/): Compute and verify keyed HMAC signatures.
- [UUID & ULID Generator](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/uuid-generator/): UUIDv4, time-sortable UUIDv7, and ULID identifiers in bulk.
- [Password Generator & Entropy Checker](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/password-generator/): Random passwords or passphrases with an entropy estimate.
- [OAuth PKCE Code Generator](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/oauth-pkce-generator/): RFC 7636 code_verifier/code_challenge plus a sample authorization URL.
- [TOTP Generator & Verifier](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/totp-generator/): RFC 6238 time-based one-time passwords, with live countdown.
- [LDAP Filter Builder](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/ldap-filter-builder/): Visual AND/OR/NOT composer producing an RFC 4515 filter string.
- [SCIM Payload Validator & Builder](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/scim-payload-validator/): Validate or scaffold SCIM 2.0 User/Group JSON.
- [Basic & Bearer Auth Header Decoder](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/basic-auth-decoder/): Decode Basic Authorization headers or inspect Bearer tokens.
- [JWK to PEM Converter](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/jwk-pem-converter/): Convert RSA/EC JWKs to PEM and back, plus compute the RFC 7638 thumbprint.
- [X.509 Certificate Decoder](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/x509-certificate-decoder/): Decode X.509 certs and PKCS#10 CSRs — subject, validity, SANs, key usage, fingerprints.
- [SAML Decoder](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/saml-decoder/): Decode SAMLRequest/Response (POST or Redirect binding) or pretty-print SP/IdP metadata XML.
- [SD-JWT Decoder](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/sd-jwt-decoder/): Decode Selective Disclosure JWTs and verify each disclosure's digest binding.
- [WebAuthn / Passkey Assertion Decoder](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/webauthn-decoder/): Decode clientDataJSON, authenticatorData, and CBOR attestationObject.
- [DID Key Generator](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/did-key-generator/): Generate an Ed25519 keypair and derive its did:key identifier and DID document.
- [bcrypt Hash Generator & Verifier](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/bcrypt-generator/): Hash passwords with bcrypt at custom cost factors or verify plaintext passwords against existing hashes.

## Advanced Ecosystem & Governance

- [Master Encyclopedia](https://www.aboutiam.com/encyclopedia/): Searchable A-Z glossary of 35+ IAM standards and acronyms.
- [Interactive Identity Timeline](https://www.aboutiam.com/timeline/): An immersive, clickable, dual-themed timeline tracing the history of digital identity from 1961 mainframes to future ambient trust, with active inline simulators for each era.
- [Vulnerability Lab / Wall of Shame](https://www.aboutiam.com/wall-of-shame/): Historic identity breaches, including Golden SAML and MFA push-bombing fatigue.
- [Developer Playbooks](https://www.aboutiam.com/cheat-sheets/): Compliance checklists for SPAs and machine-to-machine credentials.
- [GRC Maturity Wizard](https://www.aboutiam.com/assess/): 5-pillar organizational readiness assessment with an exportable roadmap.
- [Landscape Directory](https://www.aboutiam.com/explore/): Product blueprints with copyable integration code.
- [AI Architect Chat](https://www.aboutiam.com/assistant/): Simulated RAG assistant producing sample policies and Rego scripts.

## Optional

- [Contributors & Contact](https://www.aboutiam.com/contributors/): Team profile and contact form.
- [Contributing Guide](https://github.com/mayankrajjaiswal/aboutiam/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): How to add modules, playgrounds, or fix bugs.
- [License (MIT)](https://github.com/mayankrajjaiswal/aboutiam/blob/main/LICENSE)
